news.title:
Nifty sees 'Death Cross' in March, with 12 stocks including Airtel, HCL Tech, and M&M impacted.

news.summary:

news.title:
Geopolitical tensions challenge India's auto industry with raw material and energy strains impacting production and exports.
Tata Motors and Mahindra manage supply risks; MSMEs face shutdowns. Firms shift to localisation, inventory buffers, and logistical reroutes.
news.summary:

news.title:

news.title:
CLSA cuts target prices for major auto stocks like Tata Motors, M&M, Hero MotoCorp, citing crude price risks.
Preferred picks include M&M, Bajaj Auto, TVS, Ashok Leyland due to stronger execution amid earnings risks.

news.title:
India auto registrations in March rose 27% to 1.254M units, boosting Nifty Auto Index by 2.2%.
Tata Motors overtakes M&M in PV segment; Maruti retains 41.4% share. Ather leads E2W sales, beating Ola Electric.
news.summary:
India auto registrations in March rose 27% to 1.254M units, boosting Nifty Auto Index by 2.2%.

news.title:
Nomura gives Mahindra & Mahindra a 'Buy' rating with a target of Rs 4662.
Strong FY26 YTD growth in PVs (19%), LCVs (17%), tractors (23%), EV EBITDA positive by FY27.
news.summary:
Nomura gives Mahindra & Mahindra a 'Buy' rating with a target of Rs 4662.
Strong FY26 YTD growth in PVs (19%), LCVs (17%), tractors (23%), EV EBITDA positive by FY27.

news.title:

M&M's EV business is EBITDA positive with margins set to improve from PLI benefits.

news.title:

news.title:
Mahindra & Mahindra exits loss-making international subsidiaries in Japan, Finland, and Sri Lanka, reducing annual losses by ₹313 crore in FY26.
Key loss-making subsidiaries remain in the US, Turkey, Mauritius, and Germany, totaling ₹670 crore losses in FY25. Focus shifts to profitable growth.
news.summary:
Mahindra & Mahindra exits loss-making international subsidiaries in Japan, Finland, and Sri Lanka, reducing annual losses by ₹313 crore in FY26.
Key loss-making subsidiaries remain in the US, Turkey, Mauritius, and Germany, totaling ₹670 crore losses in FY25. Focus shifts to profitable growth.
